summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight covers #78130 through #78452; non-security hydrated PRs are kept independent because this is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled. Security-shaped PRs are routed to central security handling. Five listed candidates were not present in the compacted preflight artifact, so live state is unavailable for those exact refs.
